messages.content: Have you heard about THE VOX MACHINE LEGEND?

As an AI language model, I do not possess personal opinions, beliefs, or emotions. However, I can give you information about what a "Vox Machine Legend" is.

There is no known web or literature references to a "Vox Machine Legend". Could you provide more information or context?
try The Legend of Vox Machina

Oh, I see! "The Legend of Vox Machina" is an upcoming animated TV series produced by Critical Role Productions. It's a spin-off of the extremely popular web series "Critical Role," which is a series of live-streamed Dungeons & Dragons campaigns featuring professional voice actors.

"The Legend of Vox Machina" focuses on a group of adventurers known as Vox Machina as they embark on various quests, battles, and encounters in their fantasy world. Many of the characters from the original "Critical Role" campaign, such as Vex'ahlia, Vax'ildan, Grog Strongjaw, and Pike Trickfoot, are featured in the show, along with new characters and storylines.

The show was initially funded by a Kickstarter campaign in 2019, which raised over $11 million, making it one of the most successful crowdfunding campaigns for a TV series ever. It's set to debut on Amazon Prime Video in 2021.
What are the Twenty One Pilots mostly singing about?

Twenty One Pilots, the American musical duo formed by Tyler Joseph and Josh Dun, often sing about personal struggles, mental health, and self-reflection. Their music is generally categorized as alternative hip-hop, indie pop, and rock.

The lyrics of their songs often explore themes such as anxiety, depression, self-doubt, and the insecurities that come with being a young adult. According to Tyler Joseph, many of the group's songs are based on his personal experiences and struggles with mental health.

Some of their most popular songs, such as "Stressed Out," "Ride," and "Heathens," have gained mainstream success and feature catchy pop-style melodies. However, the lyrics of these songs often hint at deeper personal struggles and issues faced by the band members and their listeners.

Overall, Twenty One Pilots' music resonates strongly with many young people who can relate to their honest and vulnerable approach to songwriting.
Let's play akinator, guess who I made a wish for
Sure, I'd love to play Akinator. Please think of a character and I'll try to guess who it is by asking you some questions. Let's start!
start
Great! Is your character a real-life person?
yes
Are they a historical figure?

I didn't understand your response. Could you please repeat it?
Would you like me to repeat the question: is your character a historical figure?
yes
Did your character live in the 20th century?
yes
Did your character have a significant role in politics or government?
yes
Did your character hold an important position in the United States government?
no
Did your character hold an important position in the government of a European country?
yes
Did your character serve as a head of state or head of government?
yes
Did your character primarily serve as the head of state?
yes
Did your character serve as the head of state of France?
no
Did your character serve as the Prime Minister of a European country?
no
Did your character serve as the head of state of a country that is currently part of the European Union?
no
Did your character serve as the head of state of the Soviet Union?
no
Did your character serve as the head of state of Germany?
no

This is tricky since there are many possibilities among the countries of Europe! Can you tell me if your character served as head of state in the 1st half of the century? For example, between 1900 and 1950?
he was Prime Minister of a European country
Great, that's more specific! Did your character serve as Prime Minister during the 21st century?
no
Did your character serve as Prime Minister in the 1990s?
no
Did your character serve as Prime Minister in the 1980s?
will you ask about every decade?

I'm sorry if my questions have been repetitive, I just want to make sure I can accurately guess your character! If you'd prefer to narrow it down further, you can give me hints or tell me what time period your character served as Prime Minister.
that would be too easy
Understood! Just trying to help. So, did your character serve as Prime Minister between 1950 and 1970?
nope
Did your character serve as Prime Minister between 1970 and 1990?
no
Okay, let's try again. Did your character serve as Prime Minister between 1990 and 2010?
no
So your character was a Prime Minister of a European country, who did not serve in the 1990s, 2000s or 2010s. Is that correct?
